deg_method: NASA OSD-379 GLbulkRNAseq differential-expression results; union of four age- and collection-matched Space Flight vs Ground Control contrasts at adjusted p < 0.05 and absolute log2 fold change >= 1
official_matched_contrasts: (Space Flight & 22 to 23 day & On ISS & Carcass & 10 to 12 week)v(Ground Control & 24 day & On Earth & Carcass & 10 to 12 week)
(Space Flight & 22 to 23 day & On ISS & Carcass & 32 week)v(Ground Control & 24 day & On Earth & Carcass & 32 week)
(Space Flight & ~40 day & On Earth & Upon euthanasia & 10 to 12 week)v(Ground Control & ~40 day & On Earth & Upon euthanasia & 10 to 12 week)
(Space Flight & ~40 day & On Earth & Upon euthanasia & 32 week)v(Ground Control & ~40 day & On Earth & Upon euthanasia & 32 week)
metascape: Gene lists and manifest exported; Metascape is an external web submission and is not executed locally
